name_cn:
[White]
LE 5A7 Series New Member_Phone Bag 👓
Highly recommended this mini phone bag. For fashionistas who have seen it all, I recommend this exquisitely designed and small bag for easily creating a look ✌🏻️ Minimalist shape + metal logo clasp closure!
Practical and stylish, a high-rate item for daily matching~
Size: 18×13.5×3.5cm
Model: 735214
